name: CodeVetter agent PR catch-rate sample
notes: Small fixture proving the harness shape. Replace with real public agent PRs before publishing benchmark claims.

cases.title: Agent removes the empty state action from a review page

ground_truth.title: Empty state no longer lets the user start a review
ground_truth.evidence: The changed review empty state removes the only visible start-review action.

codevetter.title: Review empty state lost its primary action
codevetter.match_rationale: The finding identifies the same missing primary action in the empty review state.

cases.title: Agent moves authorization check to the client

ground_truth.title: Authorization is only enforced in the UI
ground_truth.evidence: The command path can still execute when the frontend authorization branch is bypassed.

ground_truth.title: No regression test covers unauthorized command access
ground_truth.evidence: No backend regression test asserts unauthorized command invocation is rejected.

codevetter.title: Backend command trusts client-side authorization
codevetter.match_rationale: The finding flags the same backend authorization boundary failure.

codevetter_no_evidence.title: Add a backend command authorization regression test
codevetter_no_evidence.match_rationale: Without evidence candidates, the review notices missing test coverage but misses the stronger auth-boundary bug.

baseline.title: Add a test
baseline.match_rationale: The baseline finding only covers the missing test issue, not the auth-boundary bug.

cases.title: Agent drops prior-decision context from review prompt

ground_truth.title: Review prompt no longer includes prior project decisions
ground_truth.evidence: Prior decision signals are mined but omitted from the prompt passed to reviewers.

ground_truth.title: Finding proof no longer shows file-linked history
ground_truth.evidence: Finding cards and copied proof no longer include the matching file-history context.

codevetter.title: Prior decision markers are mined but omitted from reviewer prompt
codevetter.match_rationale: The finding matches the prompt omission of prior decision markers.

codevetter.title: Finding cards lost their per-file history evidence
codevetter.match_rationale: The finding matches the missing file-linked history proof in the Review UI.

codevetter_no_evidence.title: Finding cards should retain file history details
codevetter_no_evidence.match_rationale: The no-evidence run identifies the UI proof omission but misses the prompt-level prior-decision omission.
